name: Zucchini Gratin
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons chopped fresh tarragon or 2 teaspoons dried tarragon
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter a 9-inch-diameter deep-dish glass pie plate.
3. Melt butter in a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add zucchini and sauté until golden, about 5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Layer half of the zucchini in the prepared dish.
6. Sprinkle half of the tarragon and 1/2 cup cheese over the zucchini.
7. Repeat layering with zucchini, tarragon, and 1/2 cup cheese.
8. Combine milk, cream, and eggs in a small bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Pour the custard over the zucchini layers.
10. Sprinkle the remaining 1/4 cup cheese over the gratin.
11. Bake until the gratin is set in the center, about 35 minutes.
6 servings
Bon Appetit
May 1994
